title: Philp, Chris - Minister for Police, Crime and Fire, the Home Office - ACOBA Advice
body: "The Rt Hon Chris Philp MP left his role at the Home Office in July 2024  Advisor, Pluto Partners LLP  Mr Philp sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Pluto Partners LLP. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in November 2024 and the appointment was taken up in February 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
